headline: Schwab Earnings Jump 30% on Rush of Trading Activity
summary: Charles Schwab’s  quarterly profit climbed 30%, lifted by a flurry of client trading activity and volatile financial markets.  Excluding certain one-time items such as acquisition costs, Schwab earned $1.43 a share in the most-recent period.  Net interest income, or what Schwab collects on the spread between what it earns on loans and securities, and what it pays to its depositors, increased 16%.

content.title: Schwab Earnings Jump 30% on Rush of Trading Activity
content.summary: Charles Schwab’s  quarterly profit climbed 30%, lifted by a flurry of client trading activity and volatile financial markets.  Excluding certain one-time items such as acquisition costs, Schwab earned $1.43 a share in the most-recent period.  Net interest income, or what Schwab collects on the spread between what it earns on loans and securities, and what it pays to its depositors, increased 16%.

headline: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
summary: Financial services giant Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 15.8% year on year to $6.48 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.43 per share was 2.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
